concerns.analysis: The entire body content of the resolution is duplicated in the HTML output. After the initial text-only version of the resolution (starting from 'NORTH CAROLINA ROCKINGHAM COUNTY' and ending with 'CLERK TO THE BOARD'), the document repeats in its entirety with full styling and images. This results in every 'WHEREAS' clause and the 'NOW, THEREFORE' clause appearing twice on a single page.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The text of the resolution, including paragraphs beginning with 'WHEREAS' and 'NOW, THEREFORE', appears only once.
concerns.output_quote: The text of the resolution is repeated. For example, the paragraph starting with 'WHEREAS, in September of 2021...' appears at the top of the content area and again further down after the first signature block.
concerns.location: Throughout the body of the document.
